title: Baal Veer
desc: A wounded bird informs Baalveer that it has been hurt by a kite that held a female prisoner. In the meantime, Patanga Pari lures Montu and his companion into a trap by offering them a kite.

title: Baal Veer
desc: Pari Ghudi abducts Manav in broad daylight and Baalveer tries to stop her. However, Baalveer's powers fail before her and he falls to the ground. Will he be able to find another way to stop her?

title: Baal Veer
desc: Pari Patanga abducts the kids and takes them to a mysterious land. In order to know her location, Baalveer masquerades as Ballu and follows Patanga's trail.
